data.title: Why Is G-III Apparel Stock Shooting Higher Today?
data.description: G-III Apparel Group shares are up in premarket trading after the company reported a 9.7% year-on-year sales growth in Q4 FY25, reaching $839.535 million. Gross profit rose 17.6%, and adjusted EPS of $1.27 exceeded expectations.

data.title: Jamie Dimon Doubles Down On Work From Home Criticism: 'Where Did You Get Your Amazon Packages?'
data.description: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon isn't a fan of remote work. Here's his latest comments criticizing work from home jobs.

data.title: EXCLUSIVE: Janover Clocks 80% Q4 Revenue Growth, 488% Surge In Subscription Revenue
data.description: Janover Inc announced Q4 results: 80% revenue growth, 39% platform fee increase, 488% subscription revenue growth, 194% ARR increase, 59% net loss decline

data.title: Rise Of DeepSeek And Trump Tariff Threats Hurt Taiwan Stocks Including Taiwan Semiconductor
data.description: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co's selloff is affecting Taiwanese stocks, leading to worst-ever selloff by foreign investors. Nvidia & Apple supplier lost 12% YTD value.

data.title: EXCLUSIVE: Vivani Medical Announces First Implant In Early-Stage Human Study Of GLP-1 Implant For Obesity
data.description: Vivani Medical completed enrollment in its LIBERATE-1 trial, testing a six-month GLP-1 implant for weight management. Top-line results are expected by mid-2025.
